'''Eyar Marath''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Sullustan/Legends|Sullustan]] [[Musician/Legends|singer]] and dancer who, at the height of her popularity during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]], traveled [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]] with a troupe of entertainers led by [[Epoh Trebor]], providing entertainment for [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Republic]] troops and personnel stationed on various battlefields. At the time of her performance on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of [[Drongar/Legends|Drongar]], one of her songs had made it onto the acclaimed [[Galactic Top 40,000]] list. While on Drongar, she engaged in a brief romance with Sullustan reporter [[Den Dhur]] and even went so far as to propose that Dhur become the patriarch of her [[warren-clan]] back on [[Sullust/Legends|Sullust]].

==Behind the scenes==
Eyar Marath's name is an anagram of Martha Raye, a singer and comedienne who performed in numerous USO shows with Bob Hope.
